title: cryptolepis sanguinolenta
intro: Cryptolepis sanguinolenta is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the African Bloodflower. It is a climber native to tropical Africa, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antimalarial and antiparasitic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions, including malaria, fever, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, powder, or tea, and is often used to support immune function and reduce inflammation.
